_comment: Canonical registry of Marceau Solutions live URLs. Single source of truth for the uptime monitor (execution/uptime_monitor.py) AND for Panacea/Telegram answering 'what's my working link'. Update here when a site goes live or changes domain.

sites.name: Marceau Air — appointment intake backend
sites.note: POST-only endpoint. GET returns 405 = HEALTHY. Any HTTP response = up; timeout/000 = down.

planned.name: Marketplace (HVAC lead resale product)
planned.status: PLANNED domain for the marketplace product (projects/lead-generation/marketplace). Pre-launch, empty DB. Stand up per projects/lead-generation/marketplace/LAUNCH.md when onboarding contractors. Separate from Marceau Air intake.

known_dead.name: Flames of Passion Entertainment
known_dead.status: NO DNS A record — domain transfer from Squarespace never completed. Site cannot go live until the domain is under our control and pointed at GitHub Pages.
known_dead.do_not_confuse_with: flamesofpassion.com / flamesofpassion.org are SQUATTER/parking domains we do not own.

known_dead.name: appointments.marceausolutions.com
known_dead.status: DECOMMISSIONED 2026-06-15. This was the HVAC lead-marketplace product on a misleading 'appointments' subdomain. nginx route removed + marketplace.service disabled. Do not revive at this name.
